notes.mxc: Built from ai-engineering-lab/ms-mxc (fork of microsoft/mxc) at git_ref; npm global package remains @microsoft/mxc-sdk.
notes.openclaw: CalVer npm package; set openclaw_npm_package in terraform.tfvars.
notes.ollama: GitHub release tag without leading v in terraform variable (e.g. 0.30.5). Linux uses ollama-linux-amd64.tar.zst; Windows uses ollama-windows-amd64.zip.
notes.windows_image: Azure marketplace version remains 'latest' unless overridden in terraform.tfvars.
